transcript.text:
It's doable if it's her
I'm sure that she can eat the whole thing
[Wild giant fluke]
[Approx. 31 inches]
[Humongous]
About 15.5 pounds
This is for about 10 people
actually up to 15 people
Hello everyone
I prepared a gigantic fluke for today’s mukbang
I need to cut this and fillet it as well...
[Scared]
I’m not sure if I can do it because I’ve never done it before
I should be okay
I can’t even lift it
It’s too heavy! [HUGE]

[Peeking]
Let’s cut the tail fin first
Okay NVM let’s do the head first
[About 14,000 watchers are frustrated altogether]
Aight, I give up. I'm just going to leave it alone
I think it’s because of the knife. It's so dull
Let’s try with this one
Oh, so it was because of the knife
Lol, I know you're frustrated. Please bear with me
I did it!
Look!
I’ll do the other side right away
I’m sure that all the sushi chefs are irritated watching me right now
Finally!
I did it!
(Let's fillet it now)

Oh no, I messed up
Come on please
[My friend also gave up on her]
[Please cut it thinner] [That’s too thick for sashimi] [Who fillets a fish like that?]
I'm trying but I can't
I’m so done with this
Yay! I made it!
But I don’t know if I can call it a success tho
Some decorations should make it look much better
I also got some abalone!
I am so sorry that it took so long.
I was expecting less than an hour, but it took way longer
Bon Appetit
Wow, this is amazing
Look how thick it is haha
Grab a thick slice

dip it in chojang (Korean hot pepper paste)
It’s….
It's actually tasty
I wasn't even looking forward to it because I did a terrible job filleting it
It's surprisingly delicious
I can call it a success
WOW
Any raw fish goes well with chojang, but I personally like it with ssamjang better
It’s so good
Seriously
It's better than any sushi bar
Abalone definitely goes with oil sauce
And ssamjang for sashimi (raw fish)
It’s really tender
I did such an amazing job on this
It’s super big. Let’s dip it in the chojang

Put a slice of raw garlic on top
So, here is the thing. I heard that it’s tastier when you wrap Ssam with the other side of perilla leaf.
I can’t tell the difference tho
[It’s the texture]
Ah, I see
LOL, somebody said scissors
That’s actually a good idea
It’s so much easier. Why do people use knives for this?
I know they use it for a reason, but still haha..
I figured that you don’t feel the rough surface on the perilla leaf if you wrap it with the back side of it.
[Did you accidently cut the chopsticks too?]
Wait, I’ve been using this the whole time?
Did y’all not notice too?
[We’ve been just watching you pigging out]
It’s really yummy
Seriously

Thickly sliced sashimi
This actually..
reminds me of..
Hoe... Hoedeopbap (Raw fish with rice and vegetables)
How can it be this good?
It’s better than delivery
Oh wait, where is..
Here we go
The fin is my number 1 favorite part
I really like it
Listen to the sound for real
It's fantastic
Tastyyy
Thickly sliced abalone
Oh no!!!
[Picked it up]

I think I’m also good at slicing abalone
It’s amazing
It’s a lot better than the one from sushi bar
(I want a piece too)
Jingu~ Take Meonji with you
Go down, Meonji
(Nope)
(What about it)
Again, ssamjang is the best sauce for sashimi
It's so good
, especially like gizzard shad, horse mackerel, and mackerel to name a few
[Can you cook some ramen noodles?]
Ramen? That does sound great to be honest
[Here you go]
I want to try out a bunch of stuff with the sashimi because I still have a lot left
If I do this, will it turn into a delicious fish ramen?

It’s already cooked.
NVM, it’s only the outer part
Yummy
So hot
Wow this is seriously amazing.
What’s this?
Is this how you are supposed to eat fluke sashimi?
The color changes like this once I dip it in the ramen soup.
It’s really soft, juicy, and tender inside, and the outer part tastes like a cooked fish
It’s absolutely fantastic
[Cutting it like a kkakdugi (sliced radish kimchi)]
No, don't you do that
[Oh well..]
[You got lucky]
So, it’s chewy, soft, and elastic at the same time
Do you really get full eating raw fish?

I'm asking because I don't
[She’s tripping]
[Gulping down]
[So the veges are decorations for sure]
What do you mean? I ate quite a bit and that’s enough for today
Move!
I’m not eating this!
I actually finished it lol
[I'm delicious too T_T]
[Aight then]
That was the last piece! wth
[Wdym, the vegetables are still there]
Nooo, I actually ate A LOT seriously
[She ate 6 perilla leaves.. for 15.5 pounds of raw fish]
[Done with the abalone as well]
Thanks for watching!
